_publications._publicationTitle: A Systematic Assessment of Accuracy in Detecting Somatic Mosaic Variants by Deep Amplicon Sequencing: Application to NF2 Gene.

_contextSnippet: TPR = 0.92 for InDels at the best VAF cut-off...we had a large number of false detections (an average of 19 and 168 FPs for SNVs and InDels per sample, respectively)
details: Achieved TPR = 0.92 for InDels at 1% dilution and TPR > 0.99 for dilutions ≥5%. Generated average of 168 false positive InDels per sample
